title: Palak Paneer
description: Creamy spinach curry with soft cottage cheese cubes. A restaurant favourite.

subSteps: Wash fresh spinach thoroughly to remove any dirt.
Remove any thick stems if using fresh spinach.
Keep water ready for blanching in a large pot.
Remove paneer from package and drain any excess moisture.
Cut into 1-inch cubes.
Keep aside until needed.
Chop onion into medium pieces.
Mince garlic cloves finely.
Mince ginger finely.
Chop tomatoes into small pieces.
Measure out cumin seeds, garam masala, and salt.
Keep ghee and heavy cream ready.

steps.instruction: Blanch and blend spinach into a smooth paste.
subSteps: Bring water to boil and add fresh spinach.
Blanch for 2 minutes until soft.
Transfer to ice water to stop cooking.
Drain and blend into smooth paste.

steps.instruction: Sauté aromatics and tomatoes for the curry base.
subSteps: Heat ghee in a large pan.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle.
Add chopped onions and cook until golden.
Add minced ginger and garlic, cook until fragrant.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft and mushy.

steps.instruction: Add spinach paste and paneer, finish with cream.
subSteps: Pour spinach paste into the pan.
Stir well and cook for 3 minutes.
Add garam masala and salt.
Gently add paneer cubes.
Pour in heavy cream and simmer for 3 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning.

seo.metaTitle: Palak Paneer Recipe — Creamy Spinach Paneer Curry
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic palak paneer at home with fresh spinach and soft paneer in creamy sauce.
